calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Nov-01-2017 Discharged

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment-Unlimited Civil Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Jul-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Denis Klavdianos, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, JULY SYSTEMS INC., A CORPORATION,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant PRESSPLAY GLOBAL, AN ENTITY WHOSE COMPOSITION IS PRESENTLY UNKNOWN,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $35,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $2,174.66
Attorney's Fees: $1000.00
Costs: $512.10
Total Judgment in the amount of $38,686.76

Judgment signed in open court.
